customManagers.description: Track pinned Alpine apk packages via Repology. IMPORTANT: bump alpine version in depNameTemplate when the base image changes (e.g. alpine_3_23 -> alpine_3_24)

packageRules.description: GitGuardian (action + ggshield CLI) must stay version-consistent

Hold pnpm at 11.1.2 — 11.3.x+ OOMs Renovate's lockfile maintenance on Mend-hosted infra; 11.1.2 is the last confirmed-stable release (the worker-concurrency floor jumped 1->16 after this). See https://github.com/renovatebot/renovate/discussions/40942 and https://github.com/pnpm/pnpm/issues/8441. The 11.x resolver will NOT be patched — the fix is pnpm 12 (Rust rewrite). Remove this rule once pnpm 12 ships and is confirmed stable in Renovate lockfile maintenance.
